metadata.title: Karate, discipline, and community
metadata.description: Official site for Mexican karate academies with martial formation, programs, news, and access to the management system.

brand.name: GOJU-KAN / Sensei
brand.homeLabel: Go to the official site home

hero.title: Martial formation with discipline, community, and excellence
hero.subtitle: We support Mexican karate academies with a clear experience for families, students, instructors, and administrators.
hero.visualAlt: Visual composition of karate and dojo life
hero.visualText: A space to present academies, programs, and news without interfering with daily system operations.

story.title: A practice built step by step.
story.body: Each class supports a clear progression: attention, character, and technique at every student's pace.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.body: Consistency gives training structure and turns each session into a chance to improve.

community.title: Community
community.body: Families, students, and senseis share a close, respectful, and focused environment.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.body: Technique is refined with care so students progress with safety and purpose inside the dojo.

about.title: Karate with structure, respect, and personal growth
about.body: Sensei Modern presents a karate organization focused on integral formation: technique, character, consistency, and community within each dojo.
about.supporting: The public site opens the door to families, students, and visitors; the private system remains reserved for senseis and administrators.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.body: Consistent training, clear habits, and responsible tracking of martial development.

community.title: Community
community.body: Dojos that bring students, families, and instructors together in a close and respectful environment.

growth.title: Growth
growth.body: Programs designed for safe progress from first classes to advanced ranks.

academies.title: Find your nearest Goju-Kan academy
academies.body: Review the branches published by Goju-Kan, search by address or ZIP code, and open the route in Google Maps.

locator.label: Your address or ZIP code
locator.emptyError: Enter an address or ZIP code to calculate the closest academy.
locator.notFoundError: We could not locate that address. Try a street, neighborhood, or Mexican ZIP code.
locator.geolocationUnavailable: Your browser cannot use automatic location. Enter an address or ZIP code.
locator.geolocationError: We could not get your location. Check browser permissions or type your address.

programs.title: Training paths for every stage
programs.body: Programs communicate the public offering without promising automatic registration or unavailable management features.

children.title: Children's karate
children.body: Classes to develop coordination, respect, attention, and confidence from early ages.

youthAdults.title: Youth and adults
youthAdults.body: Technical and physical training for students seeking discipline, self-defense, and martial progress.

ranks.title: Rank preparation
ranks.body: Structured support to evaluate progress, strengthen fundamentals, and arrive ready for each exam.

seminars.title: Seminars and events
seminars.body: Special activities for fellowship, technical updates, and community growth.

instructors.title: Close leadership on and off the tatami
instructors.body: Public profiles stay high-level until there is an official source for bios, ranks, and photography.

chief.name: Chief sensei
chief.body: Guides the training line, respect culture, and martial progression of the academies.

formation.name: Instructor team
formation.body: Supports regular classes, rank preparation, and student follow-up by stage.

operations.name: Dojo leadership
operations.body: Maintains communication with families and keeps each location operating in an orderly way.

news.title: Community activity
news.body: Public preview with static content until a news module is ready to publish.

grading.title: Preparation for upcoming evaluations
grading.body: The community organizes to review fundamentals, attendance, and goals before exams.

seminar.title: Special training for instructors
seminar.body: Sessions focused on technical criteria, class methodology, and student support.

community.title: Families, students, and senseis in one community
community.body: The public site helps communicate important activities without exposing the management system.

contact.title: Visit an academy or enter the system if you already belong to the organization
contact.body: This site guides visitors and keeps private access available for existing users.

footer.copyright: © {year} Karate organization. Public site in Spanish.
